estimated_acoustic_stop.threshold: last 20 ms RMS frame >= max(1% of session max RMS, 60 dB below max)

join.limitation: client finalize telemetry lacks session_id for at least some rows; session_id->benchmark_batch_index is inferred by ordering probe sessions by first chunk and telemetry rows by benchmark_batch_index/source order. This assumes the benchmark uses one websocket session per sample and processes samples sequentially.
join.probe_session_order_basis: first_chunk wall_time_start/done, falling back to monotonic_start/done
